name: Puffy Lux
tagline: Premium hybrid with body-adapting dual cloud foam technology
description: The Puffy Lux Hybrid is a step up from the Puffy Cloud, adding a coil support system and an additional comfort layer for deeper pressure relief. Its patented Body Adapting Dual Cloud Foam contours to individual pressure points while the coils provide targeted support. With a 101-night trial and lifetime warranty, it competes with premium brands at a more accessible price point.

specs.material: Dual Cloud foam + Climate Fiber + pocketed coils

seoTitle: Puffy Lux Hybrid 2026: Deep Pressure Relief Meets Coil Support?
seoDescription: Puffy Lux Hybrid adds coils to the cloud-like Puffy formula. Body Adapting Dual Cloud technology. Perfect for side sleepers? Read our review!
